zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前ETH/美元处于短期震荡偏弱格局，价格围绕1570附近窄幅整理，整体动能不足，反弹持续性有限，市场观望情绪较浓明显偏谨慎短线偏弱延续。

技术指标方面，价格运行在20日均线1577下方，均线呈压制状态。MACD柱值为负，空头动能占优但尚未极端，缺乏反转信号。

短期支撑关注1567-1560区域，若跌破可能进一步下探1550。上方阻力位1577及1585，突破需放量确认，为关键区间。

操作上建议保持逢高做空思路为主，反弹至1577附近可分批布局空单，止损设于1585上方，严格控制风险并关注突破方向变化。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum continues to trade in a narrow, slightly bearish consolidation phase around 1568, following repeated failures to sustain momentum above short-term resistance. The price action suggests fading bullish strength after recent attempts to reclaim the 1580 region. Market structure remains range-bound, but with a mild downside bias as sellers gradually absorb intraday rebounds, keeping ETH pinned near the lower half of its recent trading band.

Momentum indicators reinforce the weakening tone. MACD remains in negative territory at -4.69344, indicating persistent bearish momentum, while the absence of a confirmed signal line limits bullish reversal confirmation. With price trading below the 20-period SMA at 1577.45, Ethereum is technically under short-term pressure. Lack of RSI data removes overbought/oversold clarity, but price behavior suggests subdued buying interest and controlled sell-side dominance in the near term.

Immediate support is established near 1567–1568, aligning closely with the recent session low and current market floor. A breakdown below this zone could expose deeper supports around 1550 and then the psychological 1500 level. On the upside, resistance is layered at 1575, followed by the 1577–1580 SMA cluster, and stronger rejection likely near 1600, where prior supply has repeatedly capped upward momentum.

Traders may consider a cautious range-trading approach while ETH remains trapped between support and resistance. Long positions are preferable only on confirmed bounces above 1567 with tight risk control, targeting 1575–1580. Alternatively, breakdown strategies below 1567 may favor short exposure toward 1550. Until a decisive breakout above 1580 or below 1550 occurs, risk management and reduced position sizing remain essential in this low-volatility environment.
